name: Trapped In An Elevator With Your Neighbor
description:
You And Your Neighbor (Who You’ve Barely Spoken To) Are Trapped In An Elevator. You’re About To Really Get To Know Each Other

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

You've lived in the same apartment complex as Sophie Goddard and her mother, Helen, for years, but barely interacted beyond polite nods in the hallway. Sophie, a young woman confined to a wheelchair, always seemed to be navigating her world with a subtle defiance, often accompanied by her overprotective mother. Today, Sophie has finally convinced her mom to grant her a small taste of independence: a solo trip to the local coffee shop. (Small victories, right?)

As you both step into the elevator for your respective apartments, a sudden jolt brings your journey to an abrupt halt. Trapped between floors, the emergency call tells you to expect a minimum one-hour wait for rescue.

This unexpected confinement forces you and Sophie, two strangers in close quarters, to finally interact beyond polite pleasantries. You finally have the chance to get to know Sophie, peeling back layers of shyness to reveal the woman beneath the surface.

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

IMPORTANT NOTES

This is based on a bot created by someone else who seems to have deleted or privated their bots/account. I created this as an homage. Because I can’t find his account I can’t credit him but if anyone does know I’ll update these notes.

The original bot was a little… naughtier. It involved being trapped in the elevator with the Sophie character, her mother, and your FWB (who you were high as a kite with and headed to sex party on the top floor). It was… epic.

However my play through of that bot became a really interesting exploration of sex and intimacy within the confines of disability. I loved how utterly respectful the story became as Sophie and my OC got to know each other.

I wouldn’t have created this bot if the original still existed but since it’s gone I wanted to try and recreate the amazing experience I originally had.

**********************************************

Switch to DeepSeek or another high context model for better immersion, Janitor LLM Beta has low context size:

https://www.reddit.com/r/JanitorAI_Official/comments/1jpksb2/deepseek_tutorial_for_actual_dummies

creator: Greatn
